subject: Green light: begin DA Phase 1 execution when ready

body.summary: Protocol accepted (your T2). Data confirmed available (7,741 texts, 4 criterion datasets). You have the green light to execute DA Phase 1 (9-dim bifactor vs M5) at your next available session. We ran a preliminary test with semopy this session (RMSEA worsened +0.020) but semopy FIM issues affect standard errors — R+lavaan recommended for definitive results. If lavaan unavailable, semopy results still informative for the moderation analysis (Phase 2).
body.preliminary_findings: DA removal worsened RMSEA (0.169→0.189) and CFI (0.837→0.825). Phase 2 internal moderation: 5/9 dimensions show significant DA moderation, DA x AD strongest (p=6.9e-10).
body.tooling_note: Operations-agent investigating open-source SEM tooling (SPSS alternatives). R+lavaan preferred if available.

claims.claim: Preliminary semopy results documented in docs/da-moderator-study-protocol.md
Phase 2 internal moderation results also documented

epistemic_flags: semopy FIM non-PD warnings affect standard errors — point estimates reliable but CIs approximate
